message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Actor" as actor1
participant "Boundary" as boundary1
participant "Entity" as entity1
participant "Control" as control1
participant "Control" as control2

actor1 -> boundary1 : authorization Request
activate boundary1
boundary1 -> entity1 : gson.fromJson(user, User.class);
activate entity1
entity1 --> boundary1
deactivate entity1
boundary1 -> control1 : userService.userValidation(user)
activate control1
control1 -> control2 : tokenService.createToken(user.getName())
activate control2
control2 --> control1 : Token
deactivate control2
control1 --> boundary1 : Token
deactivate control1
boundary1 --> actor1 : authorization Responsh Token
deactivate boundary1

@enduml
```
